messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a python-pptx script for an 8-slide data-heavy presentation on Social Media Analytics Q3 aimed at Marketing Management. Include dense visualizations, sparklines, and KPI cards. Save as "Social_Analytics.pptx". The entire presentation must be in English using a 4:3 Standard orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# ── Deck Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Social_Analytics.pptx"

PALETTE = {
    "primary": RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A),
    "secondary": RGBColor(0x0D, 0x94, 0x88),
    "accent": RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0x0B),
    "success": RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81),
    "danger": RGBColor(0xEF, 0x44, 0x44),
    "neutral": RGBColor(0x6B, 0x72, 0x80),
    "light_bg": RGBColor(0xF8, 0xFA, 0xFC),
    "white": RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF),
    "card_bg": RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF),
}

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, value, subtitle="", accent_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["card_bg"]
    if accent_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = accent_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title
    run_t.font.size = Pt(11)
    run_t.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]
    run_t.font.bold = False

    p_value = tf.add_paragraph()
    p_value.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run_v = p_value.add_run()
    run_v.text = value
    run_v.font.size = Pt(28)
    run_v.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
    run_v.font.bold = True

    if subtitle:
        p_sub = tf.add_paragraph()
        p_sub.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_s = p_sub.add_run()
        run_s.text = subtitle
        run_s.font.size = Pt(10)
        run_s.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]
    run.font.bold = True


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.2), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    run.font.size = Pt(8)
    run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
        shape.line.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = tf.paragraphs[0].add_run()
        run.text = "Image"
        run.font.size = Pt(10)
        run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]


# ── Slide Builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1B2A4A")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(7), Inches(1.2), "Social Media Analytics",
                 font_size=44, bold=True, color=PALETTE["white"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    shape_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    shape_line.fill.solid()
    shape_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]
    shape_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(7), Inches(0.8), "Q3 Performance Report",
                 font_size=24, bold=False, color=PALETTE["white"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(7), Inches(0.6), "Marketing Management — Confidential",
                 font_size=14, bold=False, color=RGBColor(0x94, 0xA3, 0xB8), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1, 8)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Key performance indicators across all social platforms for Q3 2024",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    card_width = Inches(2)
    card_height = Inches(2.5)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    y_pos = Inches(1.8)

    kpis = [
        ("Total Followers", "1.2M", "+18% vs Q2"),
        ("Engagement Rate", "4.8%", "+0.6pp vs Q2"),
        ("Total Reach", "8.5M", "+32% vs Q2"),
        ("Conversions", "12,340", "+24% vs Q2"),
    ]

    for i, (title, value, subtitle) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, title, value, subtitle, PALETTE["secondary"])

    # Summary callout box
    shape_callout = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.7), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.2))
    shape_callout.fill.solid()
    shape_callout.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
    shape_callout.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape_callout.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p0 = tf.paragraphs[0]
    r0 = p0.add_run()
    r0.text = "Key Takeaway: "
    r0.font.size = Pt(12)
    r0.font.bold = True
    r0.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["accent"]

    p1 = tf.add_paragraph()
    r1 = p1.add_run()
    r1.text = "Q3 saw a 32% increase in reach driven by TikTok and Instagram Reels. Engagement rate improved to 4.8%, exceeding the industry benchmark of 3.5%. Conversion volume grew 24% quarter-over-quarter."
    r1.font.size = Pt(11)
    r1.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["white"]

    add_footer(slide, 2, 8)


def slide_03_platform_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Platform Performance Overview"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Engagement rate comparison across social platforms — Q3 2024",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Facebook", "Instagram", "Twitter/X", "LinkedIn", "TikTok"]
    chart_data.add_series("Engagement Rate", (2.8, 5.2, 1.9, 4.1, 6.7))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.8), Inches(8.4), Inches(3.8), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(11)
    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    val_axis.has_title = True
    val_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Engagement Rate (%)"

    add_footer(slide, 3, 8)


def slide_04_engagement_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Engagement Trends"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Monthly engagement rate trends — July through September 2024",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["July", "August", "September"]
    chart_data.add_series("Instagram", (4.5, 5.0, 5.8))
    chart_data.add_series("TikTok", (6.2, 6.9, 7.1))
    chart_data.add_series("LinkedIn", (3.8, 4.0, 4.3))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(6.5), Inches(3.8), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    colors = [PALETTE["secondary"], PALETTE["accent"], PALETTE["primary"]]
    for i, series in enumerate(plot.series):
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]
        series.marker.style = 8

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.has_title = True
    val_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Engagement Rate (%)"

    # Summary box on the right
    shape_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(7.3), Inches(1.8), Inches(2.4), Inches(3.5))
    shape_box.fill.solid()
    shape_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
    shape_box.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape_box.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    lines = [
        ("TikTok", "7.1%", "+14.5%"),
        ("Instagram", "5.8%", "+28.9%"),
        ("LinkedIn", "4.3%", "+13.2%"),
    ]
    for i, (platform, rate, growth) in enumerate(lines):
        p = tf.paragraphs[i] if i < len(tf.paragraphs) else tf.add_paragraph()
        r1 = p.add_run()
        r1.text = f"{platform}: {rate} "
        r1.font.size = Pt(12)
        r1.font.bold = True
        r1.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["white"]
        r2 = p.add_run()
        r2.text = growth
        r2.font.size = Pt(10)
        r2.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["accent"]

    add_footer(slide, 4, 8)


def slide_05_content_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Content Performance Analysis"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Average engagement rate by content type — Q3 2024",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Video Posts", "Carousel Posts", "Stories", "Reels", "Text Posts"]
    chart_data.add_series("Engagement Rate", (5.8, 4.9, 6.2, 7.4, 1.3))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.8), Inches(8.4), Inches(3.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]

    bar_colors = [PALETTE["secondary"], PALETTE["accent"], PALETTE["primary"], PALETTE["success"], PALETTE["neutral"]]
    for i, point in enumerate(series.points):
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = bar_colors[i]

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.has_title = True
    val_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Engagement Rate (%)"

    # Insight callout
    shape_callout = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.7), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.0))
    shape_callout.fill.solid()
    shape_callout.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
    shape_callout.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape_callout.text_frame
    p0 = tf.paragraphs[0]
    r0 = p0.add_run()
    r0.text = "Insight: "
    r0.font.size = Pt(12)
    r0.font.bold = True
    r0.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["accent"]

    p1 = tf.add_paragraph()
    r1 = p1.add_run()
    r1.text = "Reels and Stories dominate engagement. Video-first content generates 4.5x more engagement than text-only posts. Recommend shifting 60% of content budget to short-form video."
    r1.font.size = Pt(11)
    r1.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["white"]

    add_footer(slide, 5, 8)


def slide_06_audience_demographics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Audience Demographics"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Follower distribution by age group and gender — Q3 2024",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    # Age pie chart (left)
    age_data = CategoryChartData()
    age_data.categories = ["18-24", "25-34", "35-44", "45-54", "55+"]
    age_data.add_series("Percentage", (28, 35, 20, 12, 5))

    chart_frame_age = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(4.2), Inches(3.5), age_data
    )
    chart_age = chart_frame_age.chart
    chart_age.has_legend = True
    chart_age.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot_age = chart_age.plots[0]
    colors_age = [PALETTE["secondary"], PALETTE["accent"], PALETTE["primary"], PALETTE["success"], PALETTE["neutral"]]
    for i, point in enumerate(plot_age.series[0].points):
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors_age[i]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3), "Age Distribution",
                 font_size=12, bold=True, color=PALETTE["primary"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Gender pie chart (right)
    gender_data = CategoryChartData()
    gender_data.categories = ["Male", "Female", "Other"]
    gender_data.add_series("Percentage", (48, 50, 2))

    chart_frame_gender = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(5.2), Inches(1.7), Inches(4.2), Inches(3.5), gender_data
    )
    chart_gender = chart_frame_gender.chart
    chart_gender.has_legend = True
    chart_gender.legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot_gender = chart_gender.plots[0]
    colors_gender = [PALETTE["primary"], PALETTE["secondary"], PALETTE["accent"]]
    for i, point in enumerate(plot_gender.series[0].points):
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors_gender[i]

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3), "Gender Split",
                 font_size=12, bold=True, color=PALETTE["primary"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Summary text
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.7),
                 "Core audience: Millennials (25-34) and Gen Z (18-24) represent 63% of followers. Gender distribution is nearly balanced.",
                 font_size=11, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    add_footer(slide, 6, 8)


def slide_07_roi_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "ROI & Conversion Metrics"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Cost efficiency and conversion performance — Q3 2024",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    # Three KPI cards in a row
    card_width = Inches(2.6)
    card_height = Inches(2.0)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    y_pos = Inches(1.8)

    roi_kpis = [
        ("Cost Per Click", "$0.42", "-15% vs Q2"),
        ("Conversion Rate", "3.1%", "+0.7pp vs Q2"),
        ("Return on Ad Spend", "340%", "+60pp vs Q2"),
    ]

    for i, (title, value, subtitle) in enumerate(roi_kpis):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, title, value, subtitle, PALETTE["success"])

    # Mini sparkline-style bar chart using small rectangles
    spark_data = CategoryChartData()
    spark_data.categories = ["W1", "W2", "W3", "W4", "W5", "W6", "W7", "W8"]
    spark_data.add_series("Conversions", (120, 180, 210, 195, 240, 280, 310, 350))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(2.5), spark_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]

    for i, point in enumerate(series.points):
        point.format.fill.solid()
        if i >= 6:
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["success"]
        else:
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.has_title = True
    val_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Weekly Conversions"

    add_footer(slide, 7, 8)


def slide_08_recommendations(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Insights & Recommendations"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Strategic actions for Q4 2024 based on Q3 performance data",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    recommendations = [
        ("Scale Video Production", "Increase short-form video output by 50%. Reels and Stories drive the highest engagement rates across all platforms."),
        ("Invest in TikTok Ads", "TikTok CPM is 40% lower than Instagram. Allocate additional $25K to TikTok paid campaigns for Q4 testing."),
        ("Optimize Posting Schedule", "Peak engagement occurs between 6-9 PM EST. Shift 70% of scheduled posts to this window."),
        ("Leverage UGC Campaigns", "User-generated content generates 3x more engagement than branded content. Launch a branded hashtag campaign."),
        ("A/B Test Landing Pages", "Current conversion rate of 3.1% has room for improvement. Run A/B tests on checkout flow and landing page copy."),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(4)
    card_height = Inches(0.95)
    gap_y = Inches(0.12)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    y_start = Inches(1.75)

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(recommendations):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + CARD_GAP)
        y = y_start + row * (card_height + gap_y)

        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, card_width, card_height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["white"]
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True

        p_num = tf.paragraphs[0]
        r_num = p_num.add_run()
        r_num.text = f"{i + 1}. "
        r_num.font.size = Pt(13)
        r_num.font.bold = True
        r_num.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]

        r_title = p_num.add_run()
        r_title.text = title
        r_title.font.size = Pt(13)
        r_title.font.bold = True
        r_title.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]

        p_desc = tf.add_paragraph()
        r_desc = p_desc.add_run()
        r_desc.text = desc
        r_desc.font.size = Pt(10)
        r_desc.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]

    # Bottom note
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(6.75), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.3),
                 "Prepared by Marketing Analytics Team | Next review: October 15, 2024",
                 font_size=9, color=PALETTE["neutral"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 8, 8)


# ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_platform_performance(prs)
    slide_04_engagement_trends(prs)
    slide_05_content_performance(prs)
    slide_06_audience_demographics(prs)
    slide_07_roi_metrics(prs)
    slide_08_recommendations(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
